title: hilliardiella sutherlandii
intro: Hilliardiella sutherlandii, also known as the Sutherland's hilliardiella, is a plant species native to Australia, which belongs to the family Asteraceae. This plant has been traditionally used in Indigenous Australian medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hilliardiella sutherlandii include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to soothe wounds and skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Hilliardiella sutherlandii are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea or by applying the plant's sap directly to affected areas.
